title: M20 Corporate Action Reconciliation And Alert Summary

items.title: Corporate action reconciliation is part of canonical checks
items.description: Sync augments shadow_validation.canonical_checks with corporate_action and preserves out-of-coverage semantics instead of turning uncovered history into false warnings.

items.title: Health and alerts payloads expose alert summary
items.description: Both /api/v1/system/health and /api/v1/system/alerts return alert_summary fields that aggregate severity, alert types and provider incidents.

items.title: Workbench surfaces provider incident summary
items.description: Frontend reads alert summary and shows provider incidents and clearer alert meta, not only the raw alerts list.

items.title: Backfill smoke covers an in-coverage corporate action
items.description: The fake Tushare backfill smoke includes adj_factor transitions and asserts the latest snapshot passes the corporate_action reconciliation check.
